reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Cure Afvalbeheer
reconfigure.description: Change the municipality for this integration.

reconfigure_confirm.title: Confirm municipality change
reconfigure_confirm.description: You are about to change the municipality from {current} to {new}. All sensors and their history for {current} will be replaced by sensors for {new}. Are you sure?

abort.already_configured: Cure Afvalbeheer is already configured for this municipality.

data.lookahead_days: Number of days to look ahead

no_locations_found.title: No recycling centres found anymore
no_locations_found.description: The integration could no longer find a single recycling centre on the Cure website for {municipality}. This usually means the website layout has changed and the parser needs an update. Please report this via the integration's issue tracker and attach the diagnostics download.
